h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, left-aligned, used for primary activity titles.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, bold, serif font, used for specific calculation headers or sub-sections.

visual_matchers.pattern: Text within square brackets containing variables and operators

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer containing page number and chapter title (e.g., '130 | Soil Acidity and Adjusting Soil pH')
